final_prompt.prompt:
Minimalist logo design for a mobile app called "Spritr". 
Theme: nightlife, parties, social drinking. 
Icon: a sleek modern bottle being opened, with liquid splash forming a subtle flame or energy wave. 
Style: flat design, vector, clean lines, high contrast. 
Colors: dark background (black or deep purple) with neon accents (electric blue, pink, or green). 
Typography: bold, modern sans-serif font, slightly futuristic. 
Vibe: similar to Tinder-style branding, trendy, youthful, tech startup. 
Centered composition, logo + icon combination.

no text. just a slick design to catch the attention
